name: Spendflo SaaS Procurement API
what_it_does: SaaS procurement and vendor management platform with REST API — discovering SaaS spend via expense and SSO integration, managing renewals, negotiating software pricing using market benchmarks, tracking vendor contracts, and providing procurement workflow automation for tech companies.
use_cases: Querying SaaS spend data and vendor contracts for procurement reporting
Monitoring upcoming renewal deadlines for proactive negotiation planning
Integrating contract data with financial systems for budget management
Pulling pricing benchmark data for upcoming vendor renewal negotiations
Automating procurement approval workflows triggered by spend thresholds
not_for: SaaS license utilization analytics (use Zylo or Productiv for usage data)
Shadow IT discovery (use Torii or Zluri for application visibility)
Cloud IaaS cost management (use Vantage or Apptio)
best_when: A US or Southeast Asian tech company wants SaaS procurement management with negotiation support, vendor benchmarking, and contract lifecycle tracking in a cost-effective platform.
avoid_when: You need deep usage analytics, shadow IT discovery, or are in Europe where Sastrify's network provides better regional benchmarks.

auth.notes: API key from Spendflo account settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for renewal alerts and contract events. Accounting software and SSO integrations configured in admin. No OAuth2.

pricing.notes: US/Singapore-based company. Founded 2021. Raised $11M+ Series A (2022). YC W22. Strong in US and Southeast Asian tech companies. Procurement-as-a-service option for vendor negotiation. Spendflo Intelligence for spend benchmarking. Integration with major expense tools (Brex, Ramp, Concur). Popular with Series A-C tech companies managing growing SaaS portfolios.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for vendors, contracts, renewals, and spend data. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Procurement-as-a-service negotiation is human-driven. Expense tool integrations configured in admin. Webhook for renewal and contract events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contract reads fully idempotent. Vendor reads idempotent. Spend reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: Negotiation services are human-driven — not automated via API
Expense tool integration required for automatic spend discovery
YC-backed early-stage company — API maturity may be lower than established competitors
Annual contract — validate before API integration investment
US/Singapore focus — European coverage may be weaker

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Contract pricing data is commercially sensitive — restrict access. Expense tool integration accesses financial records. YC-backed early stage — verify security certifications are current.
